string.text: This quest seems broken or unfinished!
New fast-travel route unlocked.
Voland, I’ve got intel about your sectarians and that artifact. Swing by, we need to talk.
Looks like things have calmed down… Not sure what’s happening there, but you handled it well.
Voland! What the hell’s happening there?! The ground is shaking! Connection’s messed up! Damn it… Stay safe, buddy!
Your signal’s fading. Did you go deeper? If you stay quiet, I’ll break our pact and come to you. Just give me a sign you’re okay!
Everything alright down there? Do I need to follow? Don’t leave me hanging, old man.
Voland, I just saw Artyom… he’s not doing well, right? Friend, why do you always disappear without a word? This isn’t the first time! I’m here, as always, your loyal mate!
Prophet
Ah, you... I had hopes for you, hermano. Wanted you among us, yet I showed mercy once. But you, scoundrel Voland! Ha-ha! I gave you another chance… and still… Ha-ha… Hermano, you…

Hmm… As my father said before killing my mother: “Handle it yourself, son.” Ha-ha… You, brat, dare come to me again, planning my end? You’ll not ruin my plans. Now, quickly, face me! Let’s see who’s in charge here. I’m ready for you, my dear.

Oh, Hermano! Is that really you?! Thought you were dead! Ha-ha… Or maybe you escaped to the mainland with your little ones! But no, you came! Just in time, the show begins, and before death, you’ll witness my masterpiece! He-he… Now, bring me the head of this warrior! First to do it gets a prize! Or maybe not, we’ll see. Go ahead, brothers! Wonderful we are all here today!
Awake now? Sorry, couldn’t save you from the artifact any other way. Had to knock you out. Hope you understand.
Lucky you woke up. Almost lost you forever. I don’t get how this artifact returned… Thought I destroyed it.
Yes, it was a “Dreamcatcher”. If this isn’t the last, we’re in big trouble.
Listen, Voland, don’t tell anyone what you saw. I’ll figure out how this thing reappeared. Deal?
Sectarians? Ha! I wiped out a whole CNPP of them… Now there are rumors of new fanatics, but they’re not Monolith. Different group. I’ll keep you informed.
Yes, old man. Any news, I’ll tell you. Don’t worry, stay safe!
Unknown
Serge! What are you doing stuck there? Looking for trouble? Ha-ha!
Get lost, idiot! Damn, need a smoke… Anyone got cigarettes?
Quiet! Heard something in the second building! Move, follow me!
What the hell?
Was that… a Dreamcatcher?!
We must inform the institute… This thing is dangerous.
Agreed. Suspect sectarian involvement.
Alright, Assistant. Keep me posted.
What the hell… I thought I destroyed the Dreamcatcher. Damn it!
Don’t take it personally, old man. I’m just saving your life.
You shouldn’t be here. You’re finished!
Hey! What are you doing here, death seeker?! Stay out of this!
Attention! Enemy spotted on base! Neutralize immediately!
Did you think I’d let you go?! Ha-ha!
They should be nearby. Let's take a look around.
I'm fine! Focus on taking down these bastards!
Ugh… As I thought. Mercenaries teamed up with the sectarians. What a terrible mix…
Ouch! Damn! Voland, it's an ambush!
Ugh… Damn it!
You're right, this door wasn’t here before… Maybe someone hanging around installed it.
Found anything? I'm on my way.
Memory module figured out. Come here!
Memory Module
Coordinates of the radio beacon received
Radio Beacon
Voland, looks like you decided to stay… Smart move. I think we’re both after the Prophet. Come over, I’ve got some info to share.
NII Communicator
Connection is clear, Colonel. We hear you perfectly. We'll try to send a helicopter ASAP. Hold on!
We’ll be there shortly!
Arrived. Ready for pick-up, over.
Alright… Contact us if needed. Good luck, Colonel!
Base, this is Colonel Voland. I need an evac. How’s the reception?
Received. Awaiting helicopter, over.
Ah, Voland. Did everything go smoothly?
Oleg! Brother, good to see you!
Uncle Oleg! Help! Something’s flying around! A-a-a! Please, help!
Damn, crocodiles everywhere!
Phew… Looks like we handled it!
Well, thank God.
Cover me while I examine this anomalous plant!
Don’t even think about removing your suit here!
You shouldn’t have come here, Stalker. Now you’re in trouble!
Well…
Ha-ha, that was easier than expected.
Yew logs… This is the old settlement. They say nobody’s been here for ages.
Thanks for the backup, Voland. Glad we teamed up… We’ll settle here for now and call the others. The catacombs are worth exploring thoroughly!
What are you staring at? Come check this out…
Shall we move on?
Quiet, Lesha. No need to rush…
Damn, real burers! Watch out!
Wow, a campfire… Could even set up a temporary camp here.
They keep coming…
Such a strange glow… Hope it’s not harmful. Where is it coming from?
Incredible view!
Hmm… Who enjoys dungeons like this? Of course, burers…
Where do all these creatures come from?!
Earthquake?!
Looks like the exit is close!
If someone’s blocking your way, ask them to step aside.
New companion command available: "wait by the campfire".
Do you want to go to the surface?

Excellent… Looks like you’ve wandered into uncharted territory, Voland! Lucky for us both – we’re heading toward the village of "Zalesye" right now. From what I know, the safest route goes under the old church… Back in the day, the local PRIEST used this path. So it’s safer for both of us to meet there – the Prophet won’t find us immediately. Take these coordinates. I’ll be waiting at the marked spot, grab them.
Got it. I’ll be there soon!
Don’t go in there! It’s dangerous!
Damn… We lost him.
Look, Lesha, he’s alive! Phew… We got lucky.
The bell’s stopped ringing… And it feels easier to breathe now, right? Lesha, come over – it seems safer here.
What the…?! My head’s about to explode…
Voland! Watch out, polters!
Stay quiet… But don’t relax, anything can happen here!
Lesha, rest here. I’ll go with Voland to check the church. Don’t worry – it’s quiet here, like at a resort. No one will touch you.
You did the right thing avoiding the church… Something paranormal was going on in there, damn it.
I told you not to enter the church… Lucky you got out alive. But your legs must’ve been fast, ha-ha.
Stalker, help! We’re very close! Don’t enter the church if you want to survive. Come straight to me!
No-no-no, guys… Go ahead without me, okay? I’m not ready yet!
Oleg – we’re following you. Lead the way.
Excellent. Very good, Voland. You’re a compliant one…

I had a choice, I could have acted differently… But at the cost of my brother and Sheriff friend’s lives, I chose this path. The Prophet has probably already killed them… And now I’m coming for you, sectarian. I’ll finish you fast.
Well then… I had a choice, I could have acted differently… But at what cost? I had to go against the institution to save my brother and friend… Maybe one day I’ll answer for what I’ve done.

At the cost of my loved ones, I stayed loyal to my oath… Yet without them, everything feels meaningless. Am I still just a soldier trained to follow orders? Nonsense… I killed the Prophet, but feel no relief. Maybe I chose the wrong path after all?
Seems like this is the end for me…
You did the right thing, Voland! Clever as always! Take your brother – you’ve got five minutes, hurry up. Heh-heh-heh!
Oops… Had to knock off your buddy, sorry, he pissed me off. Enough chatter! Take your kid and get out!
You know what… Your ignorance angers me! I’ve changed my mind… Kill them!
There’s a rule… well, not even a rule, hermano. More like a dogma, you see? Trust no one… No one.
You killed the Sheriff! That wasn’t part of the deal!
Everything will be fine, little brother. Take my hand, get up.
Oleg, we’ve got a problem! It’s a trap! Exit the metro immediately. Attention everyone – run to the exit!
You shouldn’t have done that, Voland… My informant already told me what you did. You’ll regret this. The end for your friends, understand?! Bastard!
We could have been partners, Voland! Best friends… You idiot! You ruined everything!
And you didn’t even save your brother, fool! His blood is on your hands! You ruined everything!
If you were even slightly smarter, you’d have done exactly as I said! But no, too proud, right?!
Ha-ha-ha! You have no idea what I’ve planned for your arrival, hermano… I’ll make you suffer!
A few hours later
Inform someone in the NII about the Prophet’s plans
It’s me again. Passage clear, doors open.
Super! You’re a good boy, heh-heh-heh! Expect guests!
Any issues?
Seriously?! Then tell him himself – the path to his "sacred place" is open!
What do you mean?
Really? I always thought he was a psychopath from birth.
Well, the Prophet asked me to keep an eye on you.
I will, for sure. But I’ve got a counter-offer for you.
The Prophet has completely lost it. I doubt he can lead our "community" anymore.
Ha-ha… Exactly. Listen, I’m not sure you won’t snitch to the Prophet after hearing this. But if you’re interested in my offer – meet me at the canyon, by the cliff. Choose wisely, Voland. Good luck!
Kvant
The sectarian outpost has been cleared.
You’ve opened the sectarians’ ammunition box.
"Sectarian Outpost":\n%c[255,1,255,255]According to the data, this is one of the fanatics’ hideouts.
Anomalous location:\n%c[255,1,255,255]«Mushroom Field»
Alright, that’s enough. I’ve gathered plenty of mushrooms, heh-heh! Let’s head back to camp.
What the hell? This house won’t let us out!
Where did this mushroom come from? Strange…
You left Danny behind! Task desynchronized!
Wow, look! The anomaly in the passage is gone!
Well, convinced now? We’re trapped in here…
Ran off? Too bad! Ai… Alright, I’ll head to base. Too bad, Voland. But it’s your choice…
Look at that sparkle… Hmm… I wonder what these mushrooms taste like. Let’s find out, heh-heh…
Hmmm… Let me pick a few mushrooms, and you cover me, okay?
Alright, I’ve gathered a few… We could take samples to the scientists for study, heh-heh! Wait… Something’s wrong… Ugh… No-no-nooo, gah!
Interesting… I need to scan everything here.
So… I need time to take the measurements. Cover me.
Done with one scanner. Need a few more.
Almost done… Be patient, guys.
Great, finished the measurements here. Voland, we need to talk.
You now have access to the passage back. Leaving now will fail the mission.
You just arrived… At least help Afin a little more.
Don’t leave the mission yet.
Big request, guys. Follow my instructions, okay? Let’s go.
Uh-huh… The door is blocked… Alright, let’s take a detour.
Stay alert, guys. I have a feeling we’re not alone here…
At least there’s a control panel here. I’ll hack it now. Cover me!
Almost there… Hold on!
Done! Let’s move on.
I need to examine everything here. Please wait a moment.
Joined Afina’s expedition – "Stalker Lynx"
Joined Afina’s expedition – "Docent «Roman»"
Found the corpse of the "wonder-fish"!
Discovered a chest with valuable loot nearby!

Hello Stalkers roaming the Zone every day – mercs, Duty members, free anarchists, and bandits alike! Welcome to the show: "On the Wave of CHZO." Good news: the path to the ChNPP is open and safe again. Mutants and anomalies remain, but barriers, psy-installations, and cursed monoliths seem less dangerous now in the Zone’s heart. Grab your backpacks, sober up, take everything you need, and rush to conquer the Northern territories! You deserve it. Signing off, with respect: the channel "On the Wave of CHZO."

You know, when I moved from Spain to Belarus, and then to Russia, I was almost immediately drafted into the Second Chechen War. I didn’t even have time to learn Russian properly, and now I speak with you as if it were my native language. Later, I got a contract and ended up in the Zone. To you, my children! Here I finally felt alive – a place where I could be more than I could in the outside world, which had faded, stank, and become boring… and meaningless!
Attention: generator power repair in progress
So… in theory, it should work. Come on, try starting it.
Ha! It works… Task completed. Now you owe me, Voland.
Need to figure something out. The "Prophet" won’t like my answer. I need to contact Technician; maybe he can suggest something. Damn… the connection is bad here.
Hearing you loud and clear. What happened, old warrior?

Oh… You surprise me. Khm, okay – keep your secrets. I can help. Most likely, we’ll have to fully reassemble your generator, no big deal. We’ll settle up later, hah. Send me your coordinates, I’ll grab some components and come to you.
"Technician", come in. This is Voland, can you hear me?

I have a request. I ended up in a flooded underground… Don’t ask why, I’ll explain later if I get out! Basically, I need to restore a generator there, but since it was underwater, it got a little wet. Any options?
What’s there to be surprised about? The generator is fried… What do I tell him now, this finished sectarian?
Found a secret entrance to the "Flooded Underground"
I'm in position… The hermetic door’s power is off. What now?

Listen… Either you’re as crazy as I am, or you’re ignoring my instructions. Clean your ears, Voland! If it were that easy to get there, you’d be messing with me, right? Go to the nearby underground. Restart the power generator – it’s in the flooded section! Experiments there caused the flooding. Your task – neutralize the problem. If the generator got damaged by water… you figure it out yourself, hermano. I need the doors opened. Don’t bother me with trivial stuff – my nerves… Ha-ha-ha… are weak!
Crawled out of our burrow? Ha-ha-ha… Listen carefully, soldier. Provide me with a safe and easy path to the "Oasis". Got it? Catch the coordinates of this sacred place! Just like that… Heh-heh-heh.
Are you completely stupid, hermano? Imbecile, huh? I told you exactly what to do, damn it! Don’t drag this out or I’ll kill your wards, and then you! Okay? Come on, fuckup. Act!
Is that all? Will there be more instructions?
You have recovered your personal belongings.
Get up, animal. The Prophet wants to talk to you.
Crowd of sectarians
Attribute! Attribute! Attribute!

We came here with one purpose, my brothers! To bring light into the souls of children lost in this world! They don’t yet know that their actions have angered the gods! But we were sent to earth to save it, so tell me, brothers… Who are we!?
Let’s delve deeper into your mind, heh-heh…
Interesting… very interesting…
Don’t miss the details, uncle. I want to know everything about that event…
Ah… So you came for your brother?
Now your motives are clear, Voland. I understand everything about you.
Michel? Hello! It's Oleg, hi!
Where are you? I went to your place, knocked on the door—silence! Your phones were off. Now I'm at your work… Is anyone there?
How are you? Listen… What's going on with Nikita? Did he tell you anything about his plans? Why did he sign that contract? Are there problems? Money issues? What happened?
I… Umgh… Ah… Sorry, calm down, Michel! Everything will be fine, hear me? I’ll bring him back, okay? I’m getting my stuff and heading to the Zone! Everything will be fine.
I’ll bring him back—definitely. Stay in touch and… send my regards to everyone.
Hello… Oh, hi Oleg. Do you need something important?
Yes… We packed our things and went to my mom's. Just…
Yes… We… Sorry, we’re out of town. I took a vacation. We packed our things and went to my mom's. Just…
I don’t know… He just left us with the fact and went… I really don’t know anything about his contract. He went crazy!
All hope is on you, Oleg… Please bring Nikita back to us!
Memory: A few months ago
Voland, don’t you think this is a trap?
Let’s look straight into your soul, sinner!
And who are you? Ha-ha-ha… A lonely sheep or a ferocious wolf? Ah… I know who you are! Yes, I know.
Surprise, mudila!
They came to destroy us! Demons! Demons sent to drag us to HELL! We won’t tolerate their ignorance. We will destroy them! DESTROY, no matter what! FORWARD!
Voland!
He is dead! Bastards… scum… I’ll shoot them all to hell, fuck!
Voland! Molag… He… N-no!
He… help!
There should be a panel somewhere… Power is on, but we need to supply voltage. Look… ah…
Hmm… It’s dark here, like in…
Ah… Door. Let’s see… cover me, okay?
Some kind of tricks… Damn it!
What the hell?
Don’t "crow," Sheriff.
I have a bad feeling.
Do you hear that too? We’re not alone here…

Attention, general channel! I’ve returned from my mission and can now transport everyone in need to the Scientific Institute. My coordinates are already uploaded to your personal digital assistants. Thank you for your attention.
Come on, friend, insert the card. Time to save your little brother.
Whoa… Guys, watch out! Alien!
Stalker, get out of here—before they catch you!
Bro, where did you go? Over.
Everything's fine, Sheriff. Had some minor issues with the trader, but we’re good. I have the key card. Heading to the sanatorium. You coming?
Understood. We’re with you—gathering supplies with Molag and moving to the sanatorium.
Alright, see you there. Over and out.
Path to the Metro. Station: "Sanatorium"
Path to the "Underground Testing Complex"
Go to the "Underground Testing Complex"?
Testing Complex

Greetings to all the living, with you: on the ChZO wave! What a surprise… Recently we learned someone helped liberate the "Forester" camp in… *interference* …the Red Forest! And more—it's the same guy who destroyed the "Burner" under Yantar! Who is he? The hero of the week? We still don’t know, but we’ll find out soon! Stay tuned.
Voland, I’m laying low for now. If you have the envelope, hide it at night in the designated spot. In the morning, your key card will be there.
Auto Shop
Lethal dead to the cheaters!
Thanks again, Voland. My opinion of you has changed for the better. Now we just need to understand how—and most importantly, why—we were attacked.
What do these bastards want in my bar!?
In my bar?! No way! I’ll deal with these scumbags myself!
Everyone, stay alert! Keep your eyes on the elevator!
Forward—move!
Call the elevator, warrior. Let’s finish off these bums!
We made it… What a day, damn it.
Glad you’re okay, buddy!
Looks like we’re on time, right?
Get up! Don’t lose consciousness, Voland!
Please… don’t die. I need you!
Don’t you dare leave me, do you hear!?
Hold on, Voland! Molag and I are following your trail.
Voland, it’s Molag. How are you? Did you already break into the mercenary bar? Damn… signal is weak… Are you underground or what? I’m on your trail, buddy. Hang in there—I’ll be there soon!
What the… Listen! Give me one good reason not to kill you right here and now! Did you bring a tail? Answer quickly!
And the voice in my head called me—the Apostle. It keeps telling me the path, the right path. Righteous! Free! Without filth and garbage… This is purification, my brother. And you… you will be free.
You just arrived… Better do what you came here for first.
Stop! Who are you? What are you doing here!?
Aha. Right… look over there, I see you.
Why so silent?! Who are you? Do you have a pass?
Hmm… To "Tesak"? I’ll check… Wait by the door.
Proceed. Tesak is in the "Chamber Section"—waiting for you. Walk straight down the corridor to the elevator. You’ll go down to the bar, but no nonsense, got it? I’m watching you!
Ah? What the…
Yeah, I’m here to see "Tesak"—from the trader, Garrota. I have an appointment.
Understood. Received.
4ECTOR
MayLay
Yeah, go ahead and kill them. They deserve it!
Why act like a punching bag? Kill the jerks!
Seriously, you’ll give them your hard-earned money and take it!?
Hmm… I would have killed them the moment I saw them.

You know, before my mother killed my father, she said: "Son, you’re not like everyone else. You were born for greater things!" And then she lunged at me with a knife, slashing my back, arms, legs… head. Ha-ha… again and again.
Hey, I don’t get it! Who beat up Roger!? Damn it, I’ll find the idiot and kill him.
I heard a little birdie say you can get a key card from the secret entrance under the sanatorium.
Well… if you know the password, then you’re not just some random dude, right? What do you have?
Wait… I know the password. Uhm… "Kitchen a la Espanola." I think that’s it…
No matter. Just name your price.
Key card? Ha-ha-ha… Who told you I have it?
Hey! I really need that key card! What do you want for it? Let’s negotiate.
Hmm… here’s the thing—whoever told you I have it was wrong. Get lost.
What—what? More details…
That’s a different story. A favor for a favor, it turns out. So listen, it’s simple: you complete my task—I give you the key card.
Somehow this all sounds very dubious.
You don’t need the details. You need to meet an influential guy. He’s a mercenary, nickname: Tesak. He has his own base. I’ll give you the entrance coordinates.
Damn, I don’t have time for this. I urgently need that card—get it already!

Don’t interrupt. Upon arrival, say you’re from Garrota—they’ll let you through. Give the case to Tesak, he’ll hand you an envelope. Better not look inside if you want the key card. Deliver the envelope intact to me and we’re even, got it?
Umgh… okay. Give me your case.
Listen, I have enough of my own business. If you need the card urgently—don’t whine, go to my client.
Damn fanatics… They still communicate using notes? Hmm, yes. They have their own base under this sanatorium… I suspected as much.
Closed.
Umgh… Come in.
Closed! Not accepting clients.
Return to the combat zone!
Come on… is that Molag?
Metro - Station "Sanatorium"
Entrance to the "NII" Institute
Entrance to the main office "NII"
You cannot enter at this time.
Main building of the Scientific Research Institute.
Scientific Research Institute
Outskirts of Chernobyl
Here we are. If you suddenly want to go back to the Zone, you’re welcome—come here.
You cannot leave the «NII» on your own
Scientists' Base
Scientists' Camp
Stalkers' Camp
Helicopter Pad
Old «NII» Office
Warehouses
«Battery» Canteen
Checkpoint
Main «NII» Building
Return to the surface?
Path to the Flooded Dungeon
Go to the Flooded Dungeon?
Descent to the Lucky Ones Bar
Descend to the Lucky Ones Bar?
Descent to the Underground Laboratory
Descend to the Underground Laboratory?
Path closed!
Underground Laboratory
Scientific Institute
Lucky One’s Bar
Flooded Bunker
Main Office Building, NII Branch
Associate Professor Roman
Associate Professor Alexey
I have studied what you brought.
Come on over! Local taxi has arrived… I can give you a ride.
Whoa, what brings you here?
Start up, baby… And… well, let's go.
We've arrived, Voland. You're on your own from here…
We'll get there in a flash, buckle up. Heh-heh!
Here we are. Good luck!
Oops, I broke the script… Let's take a look and fix it.
Attention: Fast transition through the location
A couple of weeks later…
And who are you? Heh-heh-heh.

Hello everyone, this is the ChZO wave channel! Some daredevil turned off the "Brain scorcher" under Yantar. Who could it be? Unknown for now, but communication in the Zone is restored, and that’s great news! Stay tuned for more.
Stalkers, attention! The emission will start any minute. Find a deep hole if you want to survive.
Damn it! What's going on here?!
Damn. I need to find shelter quickly!
Emission? Are you kidding?!
Hm… Maybe climb higher? Worth a try.
Damn, the connection is glitchy here too… Where can I climb to get a signal?
It's peaceful here… like on a resort.
General Channel
Brr... What weather today! Don't feel like going anywhere, but I really wanted to take a little walk in the forest. Collect some radioactive mushrooms. Heh-heh...
ChZO News
VIVIENT-MODS
The technician needs blueprints.
Sheriff. Greetings! Heh-heh... I heard you're in the Chernobyl area now, and I'm here "passing through". There's something to discuss, but better in person. Shall we talk?
What people... Buddy! Glad to hear from you, Voland. Something wrong? Okay, let's discuss. Catch the coordinates, we'll meet there!
Received. I'll be there soon, over.
A few weeks before that...
Well... There's nothing more for us here. Let's go to the local camp, it's the only safe place now.
Don't fall behind, Voland!
Voland. I figured out the PDA. Come over, we'll think it through.

Are you filming him? Oh... Idiota! Hold the camera steady. Steady, damn it! Do you have tremors? Ha-ha, ah... Hey soldier, don't piss yourself. Just smile for the camera, hermano. People should know their heroes by face, ha-ha... Eh, isn't that right? Let them watch, closely.
"Observer"... "Comet"... Are you serious? You said it's our mutual acquaintance. Who is it?
You'll find out on site, remember the old times... Heh-heh! When you're ready - come over, we'll head to the meeting place. You'll definitely like the meeting, I don't want to spoil the intrigue!
Roger-roger, this is "Observer". "Comet", how do you read?
Sheriff, is that you? Hah... "Comet" on the line. Let's skip the military stuff.

Ha-ha! I knew you'd like it.. Listen friend, I need your help. Our mutual acquaintance is back. Ahem... You're our scout after all, do you know anything about the "Sectarians" - who attacked the military squad at the school a week ago.

Ah... So that's what interests you? I have some leads on that. I got onto the "Sect"... Let's discuss this in person, okay? We'll meet at the "Nest" - I'll be there soon, hope you remember where it is. Over and out.

In the Zone, things are still restless... Literally every day, it throws new surprises, and the number of daredevils uncovering the veils of secrets inside it is getting fewer. In the last few years, our operational command has been actively participating in raids to the center of the Zone. As for me, I've been resting from service on the mainland for almost a month now. After all, even military personnel deserve a vacation, right? But recent news forced me to end my tranquility ahead of schedule... I won't drag it out... My younger brother, Nikita, decided after his mandatory service to follow in my footsteps and become a military man. But I didn't wish that kind of "happiness" for him. As if life on the civilian side was bad for him... He became a volunteer in escorting a scientific expedition, at the request of the "Institute for the Study of the ChZO" - without even telling me, probably because he knew what I thought about it... And so, together with a squad of military prepared for such operations, he set off in search of adventures on his ass! Now communication with them is lost. I also learned that the squad of my old comrade, Captain Smirnov, also went on an expedition with scientists to search for some artifact, I think it was called... "Dream Catcher". Hmm, communication with them was cut off too. As far as I knew, the reason was the installation under Yantar. I'm worried about Nikita, so I'm heading out to search for him right now. What will I tell his son and wife, that I left everything as is? Hell no, I'm not going to sit on my ass... I feel guilty for how it turned out and worry about him. Hah... He always looked at me kind of from below-up. Saw me as his idol or something? Damn, there's nothing in me to see... I had to argue hard with the superiors so they would give in - but I must find my brother! I hope I can contact my friend "Sheriff" in the Zone - I think he won't refuse to help with the search, after all, I've bailed him out more than once in tough times for both of us. I'm heading deep into the Zone. Nikita, just please, don't get into any mess. I'll take you home soon.
This camp is the only safe place in the vicinity.
Here you can rest or listen to the news.
And here you could store your personal belongings.
And if you get bored - on this receiver, you can turn on and listen to music!
You can also get to know the locals, work for them.
Welcome. After all, this is where you will begin your journey...
Do we know each other?
Come on, did you forget? It's me, Ilay! You bailed me out from the military on the Cordon a year ago, remember? Ha-ha... I didn't expect to meet you here, what brings you?
Hey, Voland... Long time no see!
A long story.
Oh well... Alright, I won't bother you then. When you have a free minute - come by, we'll chat. We have things to talk about!
Understood... Well, okay. When I have time - I'll come by.

I was told that the attack on the military was here. But... This doesn't look like an ambush, let's take a look around.
STALKER - «Attribute»
VIVIENT-MODS present.
Important character
Yes... Some strange dream.
What... Ah... Where are you from?
Umgh... I honestly don't know myself. Okay, let's not talk about it.
Yes, you're right.
What-what, having nightmares?
So... Well, who is this "Katherine"?
You were talking in your sleep!
No problem. Well, it's already morning - and we still have a long way to go. Let's wrap it up. And also... Find your brother sooner.
Unknown voice
Once, someone told you that God did not create people - one better than the other. But this quote had a continuation...
We were only born equal... And then - everything depended only on us.
Vicinity of Chernobyl
